text: 🇺🇸 Trump is now crashing out over Wall Street Journal. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普现在因为《华尔街日报》而崩溃了。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 An informed source told Tasnim News Agency: Reports by some media outlets claiming that the Iranian negotiating team has entered Islamabad, Pakistan to negotiate with the Americans are completely false. ➡️ He emphasized: As long as the United States does not fulfill its commitment to the ceasefire in Lebanon and the Zionist regime continues its attacks, negotiations remain suspended. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 一位知情人士告诉塔斯尼姆通讯社：某些媒体报道称伊朗谈判小组已进入巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡与美国人进行谈判，这是完全错误的。➡️ 他强调：只要美国不履行其在黎巴嫩停火的承诺，且犹太复国主义政权继续其袭击，谈判就将保持暂停状态。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The “Jewish” card doesn’t work anymore bro, no one cares.
text_zh: “犹太”牌已经不管用了，兄弟，没人关心这个。

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇵🇰 Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar: Israel views very gravely these blatant antisemitic blood libels from a government claiming to “mediate peace.” Calling the Jewish state “cancerous” is effectively calling for its annihilation. Israel will defend itself against terrorists who vow its destruction.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇵🇰 以色列外交部长吉德翁·萨尔：以色列非常严肃地看待这些来自一个声称“调解和平”的政府的公然反犹太血腥诽谤。称犹太国家为“癌变”实际上是在呼吁将其消灭。以色列将保护自己免受那些誓言要摧毁它的恐怖分子的侵害。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on the Wall Street Journal: The Wall Street Journal, one of the worst and most inaccurate “Editorial Boards” in the World, stated that I “declared premature victory in Iran.” Actually, it is a Victory, and there’s nothing “premature” about it! Because of me, IRAN WILL NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON and, very quickly, you’ll see Oil start flowing, with or without the help of Iran and, to me, it makes no difference, either way. The Wall Street Journal will, as usual, live to eat their words. They are always quick to criticize, but never to admit when they’re wrong, which is most of the time! @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈《华尔街日报》：《华尔街日报》是世界上最糟糕、最不准确的“编辑委员会”之一，它声称我“在伊朗宣布了过早的胜利”。事实上，这就是一场胜利，而且一点也不“过早”！因为我，伊朗永远不会拥有核武器，而且很快，你就会看到石油开始流动，无论有没有伊朗的帮助，对我来说，这都没有区别，无论哪种方式。《华尔街日报》将像往常一样，不得不收回他们的话。他们总是很快批评，但从不承认自己错了，而他们大部分时间都是错的！@wfwitness

text: Trump: The Wall Street Journal, one of the worst and most inaccurate “Editorial Boards” in the World, stated that I “declared premature victory in Iran.” Actually, it is a Victory, and there’s nothing “premature” about it! Because of me, IRAN WILL NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON and, very quickly, you’ll see Oil start flowing, with or without the help of Iran and, to me, it makes no difference, either way. The Wall Street Journal will, as usual, live to eat their words. They are always quick to criticize, but never to admit when they’re wrong, which is most of the time!
text_zh: 特朗普：《华尔街日报》是世界上最糟糕、最不准确的“编辑委员会”之一，它声称我“在伊朗宣布了过早的胜利”。事实上，这就是一场胜利，而且一点也不“过早”！因为我，伊朗永远不会拥有核武器，而且很快，你就会看到石油开始流动，无论有没有伊朗的帮助，对我来说，这都没有区别，无论哪种方式。《华尔街日报》将像往常一样，不得不收回他们的话。他们总是很快批评，但从不承认自己错了，而他们大部分时间都是错的！

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡ Khawaja Asif, Pakistan's Defense Minister on Israeli attacks on Lebanon: "Israel is evil and a curse for humanity, while peace talks are underway in Islamabad, genocide is being committed in Lebanon. Innocent citizens are being killed by Israel, first Gaza, then Iran and now Lebanon, bloodletting continues unabated. I hope and pray people who created this cancerous state on Palestinian land to get rid of European jews burn in hell,"
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡ 巴基斯坦国防部长赫瓦贾·阿西夫谈以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击：“以色列是邪恶的，是人类的诅咒，当和平谈判在伊斯兰堡进行时，黎巴嫩正在发生种族灭绝。无辜的公民被以色列杀害，先是加沙，然后是伊朗，现在是黎巴嫩，流血事件持续不断。我希望并祈祷那些在巴勒斯坦土地上制造了这个癌变国家以摆脱欧洲犹太人的人下地狱。”

text: OSINTdefender He’s truly lost it. In a long ranting post earlier on TruthSocial, President Donald J. Trump launched a brutal attack against some of previous strongest supporters, including Conservative commentators Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones, who have recently begun to criticize Trump for the Iran War, Epstein Files, and other moves that they consider against his agenda of “MAGA” and “America First.” President Trump, in the post, call the above named commentators, “Low IQs…stupid people..NUT JOBS, TROUBLEMAKERS,” who he says have, “Third Rate Podcasts, but nobody's talking about them, and their views are the opposite of MAGA - Or I wouldn't have won the Presidential Election in a LANDSLIDE. MAGA agrees with me, and just gave CNN a 100% Approval Rating of "TRUMP," not Hand Flailing Fools like Tucker Carlson.” - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 他真的疯了。在早些时候TruthSocial上的一篇长篇大论中，唐纳德·J·特朗普总统对一些以前最坚定的支持者发起了猛烈攻击，包括保守派评论员塔克·卡尔森、梅根·凯利、坎迪斯·欧文斯和亚历克斯·琼斯，他们最近开始批评特朗普在伊朗战争、爱泼斯坦文件和其他他们认为违背他“MAGA”和“美国优先”议程的举动。特朗普总统在帖子中称上述评论员为“低智商……愚蠢的人……疯子、麻烦制造者”，他说他们有“三流播客，但没人谈论他们，他们的观点与MAGA相反——否则我就不会以压倒性优势赢得总统选举。MAGA同意我的观点，刚刚给了CNN 100%的‘特朗普’支持率，而不是像塔克·卡尔森那样挥舞双手的傻瓜。” - OSINTdefender 推文

text: OSINTdefender After appearing to express his support for the tolls yesterday, claiming that it could a “joint venture” in the future between Iran and the United States, President Trump has now stated that Iran “better not be” charging fees on tankers transiting the Strait of Hormuz, and if they are “they better stop now!” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在昨天似乎表达了对通行费的支持，声称这在未来可能是伊朗和美国之间的“合资企业”之后，特朗普总统现在表示，伊朗“最好不要”对通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮收费，如果他们正在收费，“他们最好现在就停止！” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇷🇺🇺🇦 Russian President Putin has declared a ceasefire in connection with the approaching Orthodox Easter. text: 🇮🇷 Chairman of Iran's National Security Commission on the Strait of Hormuz: "No vessel passes through the strait without the permission and authorization of our armed forces." Legislation is advancing to formally establish Iran's absolute sovereignty over the strait, but it is almost enacted on the groud. "The strait is completely under control, under surveillance. All movements and passages are under the strict, precise, and calculated control of our armed forces." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗国家安全委员会主席谈霍尔木兹海峡：“没有船只可以在未经我们武装部队许可和授权的情况下通过海峡。” 立法正在推进以正式确立伊朗对海峡的绝对主权，但它在地面上几乎已经实施。“海峡完全处于控制之下，处于监视之下。所有的移动和通行都处于我们武装部队严格、精确和计算好的控制之下。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 "Time is running out" - Iranian Parliament Speaker and potential negotiator, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, reposted Iranian conditions for a ceasefire. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “时间不多了” - 伊朗议会议长兼潜在谈判代表穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫转发了伊朗的停火条件。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Zelensky: Ukraine has repeatedly stated that we are ready for mirror steps. We proposed a ceasefire for the Easter holidays this year and will act accordingly. People need an Easter without threats and a real movement towards peace, and Russia has a chance not to return to strikes after Easter.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：乌克兰已多次声明我们准备采取对等步骤。我们提议今年复活节假期停火，并将据此行事。人们需要一个没有威胁的复活节，需要一个迈向和平的真正运动，俄罗斯有机会在复活节后不再恢复袭击。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump threatens Iran, once again.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普再次威胁伊朗。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 The Israeli Prime Minister's Office and Foreign Affairs Minister Gideon Sa'ar strongly condemned the Pakistani Defence Minister's social media post describing Israel as "cancerous," labeling the remarks as antisemitic blood libels and an intolerable call for the nation's annihilation. The Prime Minister Office's firmly rejected Pakistan's credibility as a neutral peace mediator in light of the hostile rhetoric. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 以色列总理办公室和外交部长吉德翁·萨尔强烈谴责巴基斯坦国防部长在社交媒体上将以色列描述为“癌变”的帖子，称这些言论是反犹太的血腥诽谤，是令人无法容忍的消灭国家的呼吁。鉴于这种敌对言论，总理办公室坚决拒绝了巴基斯坦作为中立和平调解人的可信度。@wfwitness

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: Concept of stepping down is not a part of our vocabulary.
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：下台的概念不在我们的词汇中。

text: Netanyahu’s Office: Pakistan Defence Minister’s call for Israel’s annihilation is outrageous. This is not a statement that can be tolerated from any government, especially not from one that claims to be a neutral arbiter for peace.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡办公室：巴基斯坦国防部长呼吁消灭以色列是令人愤慨的。这不是任何政府所能容忍的声明，尤其是那些声称自己是中立和平仲裁者的政府。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump attacked former allies in a TruthSocial post for criticizing the conflict with Iran, calling them low IQ. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普在TruthSocial帖子中攻击前盟友批评与伊朗的冲突，称他们智商低。@wfwitness

text: A large group of chimpanzees in Uganda’s Kibale National Park split into two rival factions, sparking a deadly conflict, according to a study in Science. The group—once about 200 strong—lived cooperatively for decades, but began dividing around 2015 after key social males died and a new alpha rose to power. By 2018, the split was complete, with no remaining social ties. The two groups then turned violent. The smaller faction launched coordinated attacks, killing adult males and later targeting infants. At least 24 chimpanzees have died so far, though the true number is likely higher. The violence is still ongoing. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 根据《科学》杂志的一项研究，乌干达基巴莱国家公园的一大群黑猩猩分裂成两个敌对派系，引发了一场致命的冲突。该群体曾经有约200只，几十年来一直合作生活，但在2015年关键的社会雄性死亡和新的阿尔法雄性掌权后开始分裂。到2018年，分裂完成，没有任何社会联系。这两个群体随后变得暴力。较小的派系发动了协调一致的袭击，杀死了成年雄性，后来又针对幼崽。到目前为止，至少有24只黑猩猩死亡，尽管真实数字可能更高。暴力仍在继续。来源：WSJ

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Donald Trump must be so tired of winning. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普一定对胜利感到厌倦了。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 The U.S. State Department has summoned Iraqi Ambassador Nazar Al-Khirullah in order to express the U.S. deep condemnation of attacks by Iraqi militias on U.S. diplomatic personnel and facilities. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 美国国务院传唤了伊拉克大使纳扎尔·阿尔-基鲁拉，以表达美国对伊拉克民兵袭击美国外交人员和设施的深切谴责。@wfwitness

text: Trump: Tucker Carlson couldn’t even finish College... Perhaps he should see a good psychiatrist!
text_zh: 特朗普：塔克·卡尔森甚至没能读完大学……也许他应该去看一位好的精神科医生！

text: Trump: “Crazy” Candace Owens, who accuses the Highly Respected First Lady of France of being a man, when she is not, and will hopefully win lots of money in the ongoing lawsuit. Actually, to me, the First Lady of France is a far more beautiful woman than Candace, in fact, it’s not even close!
text_zh: 特朗普：“疯狂的”坎迪斯·欧文斯，她指责受人尊敬的法国第一夫人是男人，而事实并非如此，希望她能在正在进行的诉讼中赢得很多钱。事实上，对我来说，法国第一夫人比坎迪斯漂亮得多，事实上，根本没法比！

text: Trump lashes out at Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones in a long Truth Social post: They have one thing in common — low IQs. They’re stupid people… everyone knows it.
text_zh: 特朗普在Truth Social的长文中抨击塔克·卡尔森、梅根·凯利、坎迪斯·欧文斯和亚历克斯·琼斯：他们有一个共同点——低智商。他们是愚蠢的人……每个人都知道这一点。

text: 🇺🇸 "I know why Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones have all been fighting me for years, especially by the fact that they think it is wonderful for Iran, the Number One State Sponsor of Terror, to have a Nuclear Weapon - Because they have one thing in common, Low IQs." - The Window Licker crashes out over conservative media personalities. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我知道为什么塔克·卡尔森、梅根·凯利、坎迪斯·欧文斯和亚历克斯·琼斯多年来一直与我作对，特别是他们认为伊朗这个头号恐怖主义支持国拥有核武器是一件美妙的事情——因为他们有一个共同点，低智商。” - 这个舔窗者因为保守派媒体人物而崩溃了。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 9-year-old Palestinian girl Ritaj Rihan was shot and killed by Israeli fire while sitting in class inside a makeshift tent classroom at Abu Ubaida Al-Jarrah School in Beit Lahia, northern Gaza.
text_zh: 9岁的巴勒斯坦女孩里塔杰·里汉在加沙北部拜特拉希亚的阿布·乌拜达·阿尔-贾拉学校的一个临时帐篷教室里上课时，被以色列炮火击中身亡。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 CBS: U.S. President was informed and agreed that the ceasefire agreement included Lebanon. On the day of the ceasefire Israel had also agreed to the terms of the deal brokered by Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif, which, as announced, included Lebanon in the ceasefire agreement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 CBS：美国总统获悉并同意停火协议包括黎巴嫩。在停火当天，以色列也同意了由巴基斯坦总理谢里夫斡旋的协议条款，正如宣布的那样，该协议将黎巴嫩包括在停火协议中。@wfwitness
